title: settings — model relationships
description: SettingValue is the persistence row: (scope_type, scope_id, group, name, payload).

internal.note: No FK to a Settings class — the (group, name) tuple is the logical key. Groups + fields are discovered from attributes, not stored in a table.

outbound.description: Nullable morph target when scope_type=tenant. Resolved via ScopeResolver.

inbound.description: SettingsResolver queries SettingValue rows in scope precedence order. No downstream FK.
